site.name: Al Iman Model High School – Aramoun
site.tagline: Faith-rooted upbringing, a nurturing environment, and distinguished education
site.description: A private school in Aramoun devoted to building the whole person, from KG1 through Grade 12 (Life Sciences track).

a11y.homeLink: Al Iman Model High School – Home

hero.eyebrow: Welcome to Al Iman Model High School – Aramoun
hero.title: Where faith-rooted upbringing meets distinguished education
hero.lead: From KG1 through Grade 12 — Life Sciences track — we walk beside your children step by step — in a safe environment that embraces every child and nurtures their character, values, and abilities.

intro.title: An institution that builds the people of tomorrow

who.title: Who we are
who.body: Al Iman High School – Aramoun is an academic, educational institution that strives to raise a righteous, faithful, learned, cultured, aware, and productive person — open to the issues of the age, and a partner in shaping the future.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: To enrich every student with the finest resources for achievement and excellence — through our accredited curricula, which equip students with intellectual, scientific, and practical skills, and through a qualified teaching staff that combines experience and competence, accompanying every student with the individual care that brings out their very best.

goals.title: Our goals
items: Building a distinguished, self-confident character in every student.
Cooperating with others for the good of our homeland and nation.

affiliation.title: The Islamic Education Association
affiliation.body: Al Iman High School – Aramoun belongs to the Islamic Education Association, which oversees Al Iman Schools across its branches:

stats.title: A record we are proud of

stages.title: One complete journey, from KG1 to Grade 12
stages.lead: A carefully sequenced education, where each stage hands what it has built to the next.

kg.name: Kindergarten
kg.desc: A safe, warm beginning that nurtures curiosity, language, and social skills through purposeful play.

elementary.name: Elementary
elementary.desc: Solid foundations in languages, mathematics, and science, alongside strong learning habits.

intermediate.name: Intermediate
intermediate.desc: Deeper knowledge, character building, and serious preparation for the official Brevet certificate.

secondary.name: Secondary
secondary.desc: Life Sciences track: focused academic guidance with intensive preparation for official exams and university.

why.title: Seven reasons parents choose us first

safety.title: A safe campus
safety.desc: A secure, monitored campus with continuous supervision from arrival to dismissal.

values.title: Values-based education
values.desc: A pastoral program that instills character and belonging, turning values into daily behavior.

educators.title: Accomplished educators
educators.desc: Certified teachers who keep pace with modern teaching methods through continuous training.

results.title: Honorable official results
results.desc: Consistently strong pass rates in the official certificates, year after year.

languages.title: Two languages, wide horizons
languages.desc: Deep-rooted Arabic and growing mastery of English from the earliest grades.

health.title: Your child's health first
health.desc: Dedicated educational and psychological supervision, with a full-time school nurse accompanying our students throughout the day.

care.title: Always in touch with parents
care.desc: Balanced classes, regular reports, and open communication channels all year long.

facilities.title: A campus designed for learning
facilities.lead: Spaces that inspire students and support every side of their growth.

labs.title: Science laboratories
labs.desc: Hands-on experiments that make physics, chemistry, and biology tangible — not memorized.

library.title: The library
library.desc: A quiet space for reading and research, with an ever-growing Arabic and foreign collection.

computers.title: Computer lab
computers.desc: Modern equipment and digital curricula that build technology skills from an early age.

sports.title: Playgrounds & courts
sports.desc: Generous spaces for sport and play that release energy and build team spirit.

prayer.title: Prayer hall
prayer.desc: A calm spiritual space that connects students with their values at the heart of the school day.

theater.title: Activities hall & theater
theater.desc: A stage for talent: theater, public speaking, celebrations, and performances all year round.

life.title: Learning doesn't stop at the classroom door
life.lead: Activities and programs that polish talents and build character throughout the year.

trips.title: Educational trips
trips.desc: Field visits that turn lessons into living experiences beyond the school walls.

clubs.title: Talent clubs
clubs.desc: Robotics, debate, chess, and more — clubs that uncover every student's passion.

sports.title: Sports days
sports.desc: Tournaments and open days that grow sportsmanship and belonging.

quran.title: Quran & values programs
quran.desc: Circles and pastoral programs that nourish the spirit and anchor good character.

arts.title: Arts & theater
arts.desc: Drawing, music, and drama that open wide doors for the imagination.

news.title: News & events
news.lead: What's happening at our school, week by week.

camp.title: The Fifth Summer Camp
camp.excerpt: Days full of fun, discovery, creativity, and beautiful friendships — a special program, a joyful atmosphere, and weekly trips that create unforgettable memories.

science.title: Future Compass launches
science.excerpt: A comprehensive guidance program for secondary students: a career-thinking workshop with Mr. Mahdi Gharib, and a university-major and exam-application workshop with Mr. Wissam Abou Issa — met with lively, constructive discussion.

registration.title: Introducing: Ruwwad Al Iman
registration.excerpt: Our interactive pastoral program for secondary and grade-9 students: faith, thinking skills, character and life skills, and wholesome friendship — every Saturday 1:00–3:15 pm from 24 January 2026. Registration via Eschool.

honors.title: New pride for our school: first place
honors.excerpt: Congratulations to our outstanding student on winning first place in the Trilingual Language Competition, with thanks to Beirut Arab University for this meaningful initiative. Onward to more excellence

testimonials.title: Parents' trust is our dearest testimonial

t1.quote: From day one we felt our son was in safe hands; the follow-up is daily and reaching the administration is quick and easy.
t1.name: Umm Omar

t2.quote: The school doesn't just teach — it raises. We saw a beautiful change in our daughter's character and self-confidence.
t2.name: Abu Leen

t3.quote: The official results were excellent, and best of all, our children head to school every morning with love.
t3.name: The Hammoud family
t3.role: Parents of two students, elementary and secondary

gallery.title: Glimpses of our days
gallery.lead: From classrooms to courtyards — moments that tell the story of a day at Al Iman.

admissions.title: Your path to us, in four steps
admissions.lead: A clear, simple registration journey — our team walks beside you at every step.

s1.title: Reach out
s1.desc: Message us on WhatsApp or call to inquire and book an appointment.

s2.title: Visit the school
s2.desc: A guided campus tour and a meeting with the administration.

s3.title: Apply
s3.desc: Complete the registration form and submit the required documents.

s4.title: Welcome aboard
s4.desc: Admission confirmed — your child takes their seat in class.

fees.title: Tuition & fees for the 2026–2027 school year
fees.stationery: Stationery, prints & trips: to be announced.

registration.title: Registration fee
registration.desc: 10,000,000 LBP + $300 — included in the tuition above, non-refundable and not subject to any discount.

siblings.title: Sibling discount
siblings.desc: 10% of tuition and support for the 2nd child, 15% for the 3rd, and 20% from the 4th onward — KG1 is not subject to discounts.

newStudent.title: New students
newStudent.desc: A $100 file-opening fee is paid at registration; fees and stationery are also settled at registration.

payment.title: Payment schedule
payment.desc: Tuition and operational support are paid per the agreement signed with the school.

proof.title: This website was built by one of our students
proof.p1: The pages you are browsing were not commissioned from an agency — they were designed and built by a student of Al Iman Model High School, Aramoun. We do not simply graduate students; we give them the courage to think, and the tools that turn curiosity into skill, and skill into real work people can touch.
proof.p2: If one student can craft this… imagine what your children are capable of.
proof.signature: By our students, with their school behind them

cta.title: Give your children the start they deserve
cta.lead: Our team is ready to answer your questions and walk you through registration — on WhatsApp, by phone, or with a visit to the school.

about.title: About the School
about.lead: Who we are, our mission, our goals, and the values we raise our generations on.

academics.title: Academics
academics.lead: One complete educational journey, from KG1 to the official secondary certificate.

admissions.title: Admissions
admissions.lead: Clear, simple steps that bring your children to their seats.

news.title: News & Events
news.lead: The latest from our school, all year round.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.lead: We would love to hear from you and answer every question.

footer.about: A private school in Aramoun devoted to building the whole person — in knowledge and in character — from KG1 through Grade 12.
footer.affiliation: Al Iman High School – Aramoun belongs to the Islamic Education Association, which oversees Al Iman Schools across its branches: Zarif, Bourj, Cola, Aramoun, Aarqoub, Tripoli, and Barja.
footer.viewOnMap: Open the school's location on Google Maps
